originalTitle: Why a borrowing binge by investors is a warning sign for the stock market
summary: Investors are increasingly borrowing to buy stocks, a reflection of greed in the stock market as they seek to amplify returns with margin debt. The growing pile of borrowed money has some on Wall Street nervous.
content: Investors are increasingly borrowing to buy stocks, a reflection of greed in the stock market as they seek to amplify returns with margin debt. The growing pile of borrowed money has some on Wall Street nervous.
chineseTitle: 为什么投资者的借贷狂欢是股市的一个警告信号
chineseSummary: 投资者越来越多地借钱购买股票，这反映了股市的贪婪，因为他们寻求通过保证金债务来放大回报。不断增加的借钱让华尔街的一些人感到紧张。
chineseContent: 投资者越来越多地借钱购买股票，这反映了股市的贪婪，因为他们寻求通过保证金债务来放大回报。不断增加的借钱让华尔街的一些人感到紧张。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
